column1: Juan Soto leads the slate with a strong combination of top-of-the-order consistency and a favorable platoon advantage, making him a reliable pick to record a hit. Ildemaro Vargas offers even steadier recent contact and an excellent rate of games with a hit, also benefitting from a soft matchup at home. Matt Olson and Oneil Cruz both hold the platoon edge but have shown less recent reliability, while Xavier Edwards’ recent hot streak is tempered by a tougher opposing pitcher.
